overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street featuring massive holographic advertisements and neon-lit architecture. The character navigates through intersections with moderate pedestrian and vehicle traffic in a high-fidelity game engine environment reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077.

events.description: begins walking forward from stopped position at the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at crosswalk then beginning to walk across as pedestrians pass by

large vertical screen displaying fashion advertisement with pink neon

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic city intersection under a partly cloudy sky. The camera waits at a crosswalk as pedestrians walk across, then begins moving forward. A massive curved holographic canopy with rainbow lights spans overhead, while digital billboards and parked futuristic vehicles line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane street with overhead holographic displays

events.description: passes the central traffic pole and enters the main intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the intersection toward the distant cylindrical tower

entered.detail: tall cylindrical building with the number 06 displayed prominently on the facade
ground-level commercial shops with glass facades and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Moving through the wide intersection, the camera passes the central traffic pole while the curved holographic canopy shifts overhead. A distinctive cylindrical tower marked with '06' dominates the distant skyline, while futuristic vehicles drive along the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with overhead light installation

events.description: approaching next intersection with large digital billboard becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking down the street approaching the next crosswalk with moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving down the street away from the camera

entered.detail: massive vertical screen displaying a stylized panther face with pink neon text
tall palm trees lining the right sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing down the commercial street, the cylindrical tower fades into the distance while a large digital billboard featuring a neon panther becomes prominent on the right. The curved holographic canopy shifts to the left side as palm trees and storefronts line the approaching intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crossing and vehicle traffic

events.description: stops at crosswalk to wait for passing vehicles
blue car followed by pink car and green car pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: stopped at crosswalk waiting for traffic to clear while pedestrians gather at the corner

notable_agents.action: pink sports car driving through the intersection followed by a green compact car

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing lines with glowing green text
raised pedestrian platform with orange tactile paving

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a busy crosswalk as vehicles including a pink sports car and green compact car pass through. Pedestrians wait on the orange-tiled sidewalk while the large panther billboard looms prominently on the right. The crosswalk features glowing green text embedded in the yellow stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk with storefronts and street furniture

events.description: crosses the street and steps onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and moving onto the sidewalk, passing parked vehicles and benches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white outfit crossing the street in the opposite direction

entered.detail: dark futuristic sedan parked on the sidewalk next to orange benches
orange metal benches lined up along the storefront windows
blue garbage bags piled next to the storefront entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street and moves onto the sidewalk, passing a parked car and orange benches. The large panther billboard is left behind as the perspective shifts to follow the covered walkway lined with storefronts and street planters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic intersection that transitions into a dense commercial district. It begins at a crosswalk under a partly cloudy sky, moving forward beneath a massive curved holographic canopy with rainbow lights and past parked futuristic vehicles. As the camera passes a central traffic pole, the perspective shifts toward a distant cylindrical tower marked with 06 before the skyline opens up to reveal a prominent neon panther billboard on the right. The scene then slows at a busy intersection where a pink sports car and green compact car pass over glowing green crosswalk text, while pedestrians wait on orange-tiled sidewalks. Finally, the camera crosses the street and leaves the panther billboard behind, moving past orange benches to follow a covered walkway lined with storefronts and street planters.
